## [00:00 - 01:25]

Have you ever noticed how sometimes some ads have a gallery? So lots of different photos, some of them are even videos, sorry. So how do they do that? Well there's a couple ways that you can actually do this. One of the first things you can actually do is to actually create a photo gallery. So actually upload a photo album, sorry I should say. So go under albums and go create albums. And let's say for example we were going to use this. Well what you could actually do is when you upload this it will show up on your feed as a post. So the same way that you would have a normal post ID. And you can actually just boost this album. The second thing that you can do is just upload a whole bunch of photos. And when you do so you'll notice it gives you the option to add even more. So I'm just uploading a whole bunch of random stuff. I have no idea what I'm uploading here. But let's go and do that. Okay, now when you click post essentially this is going to be like any other post on Facebook and you can boost this through your ad account and also boost it through your news feed. So you'll notice you can make some of these videos by the way as well guys. So you'll notice it will look like this. Really great for e-commerce and you could just boost this the way you'd normally boost any post or also do that through your ad account.
